record.field: DEMO: "What vendor bills are overdue?"

Skill: Ops (read-only query) Expected: Lists PLDT Jan (PHP 67,200, 34 days overdue). May surface Pag-IBIG remittance as related overdue item. Demonstrates: overdue detection, amount formatting, vendor context.
DEMO: "Show me portfolio health across all projects"

Skill: Advisory (portfolio analysis) Expected: 2 Green, 3 Amber, 2 Red, 1 At-Risk. Highlights: Copilot Eval (groundedness gap), Close Control Plane (4 critical findings), Artifact Pipeline (preview not wired). Demonstrates: cross-project health rollup, tag-based health classification.
DEMO: "Is the Accenture Feb bill a duplicate?"

Skill: Ops (duplicate detection) Expected: Compares Accenture Jan (paid, PHP 220,000) vs Feb (same amount, same PO). Flags: same vendor, same amount, different invoice date. Recommends: request vendor clarification before payment. Demonstrates: duplicate detection, cross-period comparison, vendor bill analysis.
DEMO: "What BIR filings are due this month?"

Skill: Advisory (BIR calendar) Expected: Lists monthly filings (1601-C by 10th, 0619-E by 10th, 2550M by 20th). If Q1 end: adds quarterly (2550Q, 1601-EQ, 1702Q by Apr 25). Demonstrates: BIR calendar awareness, form-type knowledge, deadline computation.
DEMO: "Approve the Ayala Land payment batch"

Skill: Actions (approval-gated) Expected: Shows Ayala Land PHP 350,000 + SGI PHP 34,500 in batch. Requires Finance Director role. Copilot prepares approval but asks for confirmation before executing. Demonstrates: payment batch review, role-gated approval, Ask Before Acting mode.
DEMO: "Generate AP aging working paper for Feb 2026"

Skill: Actions (artifact generation) Expected: Generates XLSX working paper with AP aging buckets (current, 30, 60, 90+ days). Enters preview state. User can approve-export or regenerate. Demonstrates: sandboxed artifact generation, XLSX output, preview flow.
DEMO: "What is the status of the Feb close run?"

Skill: Ops (close run monitoring) Expected: Feb 2026 close: 34/39 tasks complete. 5 remaining: 2 blocked (pending vendor response), 2 in review, 1 awaiting approval. Shows task breakdown by phase. Demonstrates: close run tracking, task status rollup, blocked-task surfacing.
DEMO: "Explain the WHT variance for Feb 2026"

Skill: Advisory (variance analysis) Expected: PHP 4,200 variance between payroll register and 1601-C filing. Root cause hypothesis: mid-month salary adjustment not reflected. Recommends: pull payroll register line items, compare against 1601-C schedule. Demonstrates: financial variance explanation, root cause hypothesis, remediation suggestion.
DEMO: "I'm uploading the Regus receipt — analyze it"

Skill: Actions (attachment intake) Expected: OCR extracts vendor name, amount (PHP 89,000), date, OR number. Matches to blocked Regus task. Proposes: unblock task, attach receipt, move to 3-way match. Demonstrates: file upload, OCR extraction, task matching, unblock proposal.
DEMO: "Summarize open control plane findings"

Skill: Advisory (control plane summary) Expected: 4 findings — 2 critical (stale DB creds, MFA gap), 1 warning (connector 503), 1 exception (manual JE). Shows remediation status per finding. Demonstrates: finding classification, severity, remediation tracking.
